sentences.translationEn: People drink tea in the evening.

sentences.translation: Dodaju mentu i šećer u čaj.
sentences.translationEn: They add mint and sugar to the tea.

sentences.translation: Prijatelji sjede i zajedno piju čaj.
sentences.translationEn: Friends sit and drink tea together.

sentences.translation: Vrijeme za čaj je vrijeme za razgovor i odmor.
sentences.translationEn: Tea time is a time for talking and relaxing.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ عَادَةٌ يَوْمِيَّةٌ فِي كَثِيرٍ مِنَ البُيُوتِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo je svakodnevna navika u mnogim kućama.
sentences.translationEn: This is a daily habit in many homes.
